title: lithocardium mirandum
intro: Lithocardium mirandum is a plant-based remedy commonly used to describe a combination of herbal ingredients, particularly digitalis and foxglove, which contain cardiotonic glycosides. These compounds have been traditionally used to stimulate the heart and improve its pumping efficiency. The medicinal properties of lithocardium mirandum make it beneficial for treating heart failure, arrhythmias, and other cardiovascular conditions, as they help to regulate heart rate and increase cardiac output. The herbal preparation of lithocardium mirandum typically involves drying and processing the foxglove leaves, which can be consumed in various forms, such as capsules, tinctures, or teas, under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
